task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "初始化tkinter窗口以隐藏主界面"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "打开文件选择对话框，允许用户选择MP3文件"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "检查用户是否选择了文件"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "尝试加载所选文件为AudioSegment对象以验证格式"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "提取音频文件的元数据（时长、声道数、采样率等）"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "捕获解码错误并提示文件损坏或无效"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "捕获其他未知错误并输出详细信息"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "将MP3文件导出为临时WAV文件"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "初始化语音识别器以准备语音转文字"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "从WAV文件中读取音频数据"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "调用Google Speech API进行语音识别"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "捕获语音识别失败的异常"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "对识别结果进行基础文本整理（如添加句号）"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "将整理后的文本保存到文件"}, {"id": "Node15", "description": "清理临时WAV文件"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "initializeUI"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "checkSelection"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "validateFile"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "extractMetadata"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node6", "type": "handleDecodeError"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "handleUnknownError"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node8", "type": "convertToWAV"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "initializeSpeechRecognizer"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "loadAudioData"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "performSpeechRecognition"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "handleRecognitionFailure"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node13", "type": "formatTranscription"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node14", "type": "saveTranscriptionToFile"}, {"source": "Node14", "target": "Node15", "type": "cleanupTemporaryFiles"}]}
